summary: Frontend testing for iteration 24 features: Chat Ayarları panel, ZETA/Judge AI customization, Girinti (Indent) tool, Kenar Boşlukları (Margins) tool, and 80+ fonts with search. All features working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 24 features verified working: (1) Chat Settings button (data-testid='chat-settings-btn') opens Chat Ayarları panel from gear icon next to ZETA/Judge tabs, (2) ZETA Mod options: Neşeli, Profesyonel, Meraklı, Özel, (3) ZETA Emoji options: Kullanma, Az Kullan, Orta, Çok Kullan, (4) Judge Mod options: Normal (Yapıcı eleştiri), Sert (Esprili dalga geçme), (5) Font panel has 100 fonts (exceeds 80+ requirement) with working search filter, (6) Girinti (Indent) tool opens panel with Sol/Sağ/Üst/Alt sliders, (7) Kenar Boşlukları (Margins) tool opens panel with input fields and Normal/Dar/Geniş presets

features_tested.chat_settings_button: PASSED - data-testid='chat-settings-btn' visible as gear icon next to ZETA/Judge tabs
features_tested.chat_settings_panel: PASSED - Title 'Chat Ayarları', has ZETA and Judge sections
features_tested.zeta_mod_options: PASSED - Options: 🎉 Neşeli, 💼 Profesyonel, 🔍 Meraklı, ✨ Özel
features_tested.zeta_emoji_options: PASSED - Options: ❌ Kullanma, 📍 Az Kullan, 📌 Orta, 🎯 Çok Kullan
features_tested.judge_mod_options: PASSED - Options: ⚖️ Normal (Yapıcı eleştiri), 🔥 Sert (Esprili dalga geçme)
features_tested.font_panel_search: PASSED - Search filters fonts correctly (100 total, 'Roboto'→2, 'Mont'→1)
features_tested.indent_tool_panel: PASSED - 'Girinti' panel with Sol/Sağ/Üst/Alt sliders and Sıfırla button
features_tested.margins_tool_panel: PASSED - 'Kenar Boşlukları' panel with Üst/Alt/Sol/Sağ inputs and Normal/Dar/Geniş presets

mocked_apis.google_drive: Google Drive file operations are MOCKED
